content:
💡 voicebox | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide users with a comprehensive, privacy-focused, and locally-run AI voice studio for voice cloning, speech generation, and voice input.
✨ Key Features: • Local-first AI voice studio • Voice cloning (zero-shot) • Speech generation (7 TTS engines, 23 languages) • Voice input (global dictation hotkey) • Post-processing effects
📖 Summary: Voicebox is an open-source, local-first AI voice studio that allows users to clone voices, generate speech in multiple languages and TTS engines, and use voice input for dictation. It provides a complete voice I/O stack running locally for enhanced privacy and control, offering an alternative to cloud-based services like ElevenLabs and WisprFlow.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
